code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let raw = io.read_to_end()
let input = "#{raw} "
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut token = ""
mut i = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            if string.is_empty(evens)
              evens = "#{v}"
            else
              evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
            end
          else
            if string.is_empty(odds)
              odds = "#{v}"
            else
              odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
